serverInfo.name: hwpforge-mcp
serverInfo.title: HwpForge MCP Server
serverInfo.description: AI-first Korean HWPX document generation and editing tools

initialize.instructions: HwpForge MCP server for Korean HWPX document generation and editing. Converts Markdown to HWPX, inspects document structure, and supports JSON round-trip editing. Use hwpforge_templates to discover available style templates before creating documents. Resources provide style template details. Prompts guide document creation workflows.

next: Use hwpforge_to_json to export for editing
Use hwpforge_convert to create new documents
Edit the JSON and use hwpforge_patch to apply changes
Use hwpforge_inspect to understand structure first

stem.original_text: △ABC에서 AB 위의 점 E와 AC 위의 점 D에 대하여 ∠ABC = ∠ADE이고, AB = 14cm, AE = 6cm, AD = 8cm, DC = x(cm)일 때, x의 값은? [4점]

explanation.original_text: 주어진 조건에서 E는 AB 위, D는 AC 위에 있으므로

failure.message: 현재 HwpForge patch 경로는 텍스트 이외 변경을 허용하지 않습니다.

detail.message: Preserving patch failed: Invalid HWPX structure: preserving patch currently supports text-only section edits; structural change detected
detail.hint: Re-export the target section with the current hwpforge_to_json tool so preservation metadata is embedded. Structural/style changes still require a broader rebuild workflow.
